seed_text: Nature is the symbol of spirit. Every natural fact is a symbol of some spiritual fact
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
green moss and things you can’t name.
a breeze carrying a memory of forever.
everything means everything else.
there’s a pulse here.
a little voice, a lot of soul.
dan_extract:
here, a feeling of endless time going nowhere.
a rhythm of life that gets louder and louder.
claim_status: NO_CLAIM
